g.text: Correlation: trace_id turns three tools into one debugger
Alert -> trace -> log, joined by one ID. Without the thread, each pillar is an island.
-> all log lines for THIS request
Alert -> root cause = 5 hops, single ID, no context-switch tax
Without the trace_id thread: 3 dashboards open, 3 manual time-window joins, 30 - 60 min debugging session.
With it: alert -> click exemplar -> click span -> filter logs.
